problem id: 4a374160
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00100010 -> 10000010
  10000010 -> 10001000
  11101010 -> 10001110
  11011100 -> 00001101
  01111011 -> 11000111
  00001111 -> 11000000
  00001101 -> 01000000
  10101111 -> 11001010
  11001010 -> 10001100
  00011011 -> 11000001

query: 01101100
predicted answer: 00000110
